name: John Lennon
title: Last known photo of John Lennon, taken on December 8, 1980, as he signed an autograph for Mark David Chapman — the man who would murder him hours later.
description: John Lennon was photographed outside his Manhattan apartment building, The Dakota, on the afternoon of December 8, 1980, signing a copy of his album 'Double Fantasy' for a fan. That fan was Mark David Chapman. Hours later, as Lennon and Yoko Ono returned home from a recording session that evening, Chapman shot Lennon four times in the back. He was 40 years old.
bio: John Lennon was an English singer, songwriter, and peace activist who co-founded the Beatles. His solo career and activism for peace made him one of the most influential cultural figures of the 20th century.
